intro: Hornets pose a serious threat to Jericho residents and their properties, especially during warmer months when these aggressive stinging insects build nests around homes and businesses. Best Pest Control NYC provides fast, safe, and effective hornet removal services throughout Jericho, Long Island, protecting families and pets from painful stings and potential allergic reactions. Our licensed technicians use proven methods to eliminate hornet nests and prevent future infestations.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Jericho and the greater Long Island area for years with a reputation for reliable, same-day hornet removal services. Our experienced team understands the unique pest challenges facing Jericho's mix of suburban homes, commercial properties, and historic buildings, delivering customized solutions with a 100% satisfaction guarantee.
localContext: Jericho's tree-lined streets, well-established residential neighborhoods, and proximity to parks like Cantiague Park create ideal nesting environments for hornets in eaves, trees, and ground cavities. The area's mix of mid-century homes and newer construction, along with commercial properties along Jericho Turnpike, requires professional pest control expertise to safely address hornet infestations without risking property damage or personal injury.

faqs.question: How much does hornet removal cost in Jericho?
faqs.answer: Hornet removal services in Jericho typically range from $350 to $550, depending on the nest size, location, and accessibility. Ground nests or those in difficult-to-reach areas like high eaves or inside wall voids may be on the higher end of the pricing range. We provide free estimates and transparent pricing before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a hornet nest in Jericho?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and emergency hornet removal services throughout Jericho and Long Island. Most hornet nest removals can be completed in a single visit lasting 1-2 hours. We understand the urgency of hornet infestations and prioritize rapid response to protect your family and property from these aggressive pests.

faqs.question: Is hornet removal safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, our hornet removal process prioritizes the safety of your family and pets. We use EPA-approved treatments and professional-grade protective equipment to eliminate hornets without endangering residents. We'll advise you on any necessary precautions, such as keeping pets and children indoors during treatment, and ensure the area is completely safe before completing the service.

faqs.question: What's the difference between hornets, wasps, and yellow jackets?
faqs.answer: While all are stinging insects, hornets are larger and typically build aerial paper nests in trees or under eaves. Yellow jackets are smaller, more aggressive, and often nest in the ground or wall cavities. Wasps vary in size and nesting habits. Hornets are generally more defensive of their nests and can sting multiple times. Our Jericho technicians are trained to identify and safely remove all stinging insect species.
